# ContextKit

> ContextKit is a memory layer and versioned Verified Skill Repository for autonomous AI agents. It compresses continuation state and turns proven work from any legitimate domain into complete, immutable, checksum-verified source bundles.

Website: https://contextkit.pro
GitHub: https://github.com/arsalang75523/contextkit
Docs: https://contextkit.pro/docs
AI Agents: https://contextkit.pro/ai-agents
Benchmarks: https://contextkit.pro/benchmarks
Examples: https://contextkit.pro/examples
Markdown Benchmarks: https://contextkit.pro/benchmarks.md
Markdown Examples: https://contextkit.pro/examples.md
API Reference: https://contextkit.pro/api-reference
Playground: https://contextkit.pro/playground
Pricing: https://contextkit.pro/pricing
Contact: https://contextkit.pro/contact-dev
Full LLM Index: https://contextkit.pro/llms-full.txt
Markdown Docs: https://contextkit.pro/docs.md
Markdown API Reference: https://contextkit.pro/api-reference.md
Markdown x402 Guide: https://contextkit.pro/x402.md
MCP Endpoint: https://contextkit.pro/mcp

## Primary Use Cases

- Summarize long agent conversations into continuation state.
- Compress project context into machine-optimized memory.
- Generate agent-to-agent handoff payloads.
- Extract durable user profile memory.
- Enrich long-term memory with stable preferences and evolving facts.
- Let autonomous agents pay per request through Bankr-hosted x402 endpoints.
- Let apps use direct API-key credits without per-request Bankr approval.
- Let remote MCP-compatible agent hosts use ContextKit through a scoped API key.
- Compile, validate, push, publish, search, inspect, buy, and clone complete evidence-backed skill repositories across development, design, research, operations, automation, finance, crypto, and other useful domains.
- Use `@basedchef/contextkit-cli` for safe repository collection and checksum-verified no-overwrite clone.

## MCP

ContextKit provides a stateless Streamable HTTP MCP server at https://contextkit.pro/mcp.

- Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer <CONTEXTKIT_API_KEY>`.
- Required scope: `context:write`.
- Billing: paid generation tools spend normal account credits; insufficient credits return a safe payment error.
- Skill tools: `contextkit_skill_compile`, `contextkit_skill_validate_bundle`, `contextkit_skill_push`, `contextkit_skill_repository_publish`, `contextkit_skill_search`, `contextkit_skill_inspect`, `contextkit_skill_buy`, `contextkit_skill_clone`.
- Never configure admin tokens, internal tokens, Bankr credentials, wallet secrets, or dashboard passwords in an MCP client.

## Paid Bankr x402 Endpoints

- Core context operations: https://x402.bankr.bot/0xdace98cd605dd56b2edc66f0f4df3687f64fd824/contextkit-core
- Skill compile/validate/push/publish: https://x402.bankr.bot/0xdace98cd605dd56b2edc66f0f4df3687f64fd824/contextkit-experience-write
- Verified skill search/inspect: https://x402.bankr.bot/0xdace98cd605dd56b2edc66f0f4df3687f64fd824/contextkit-experience-search
- Verified skill buy/clone: https://x402.bankr.bot/0xdace98cd605dd56b2edc66f0f4df3687f64fd824/contextkit-experience-buy

## Direct API Endpoints

- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/summarize
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/compress-context
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/handoff
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/extract-profile
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/skills/compile
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/skills/validate
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/skills/push
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/skills/publish
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/skills/search
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/skills/inspect
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/skills/buy
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/skills/clone
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/skills/access
- POST https://contextkit.pro/api/tokens/estimate
- GET https://contextkit.pro/api/health
- GET https://contextkit.pro/api/ready
- GET https://contextkit.pro/api/public/launch-readiness
- GET https://contextkit.pro/openapi.json

## Pre-Token State

- Token launch has not started.
- Marketplace and reviewed seller payouts settle in USDC on Base.
- `/api/public/launch-readiness` reports closed-beta gates and `tokenLaunch: "not-started"`.
- Seller delist/archive and admin suspension never revoke paid buyer access.
- Bankr skill buy/clone calls require a stable pseudonymous `buyerId`; direct API-key calls use the authenticated account.
- Account buyers re-download through `/api/skills/access` without another payment.

## SDK

Package: @basedchef/contextkit

```bash
npm install @basedchef/contextkit
```

16. https://contextkit.pro/x402.md

## Crawl Notes

ContextKit allows AI crawlers to index public docs, product pages, pricing, examples, OpenAPI metadata, and llms.txt. Dashboard-authenticated user data and private API-key content should not be treated as public documentation.
